mission.title: tremor: Factor out ID + Module into a `NodeId` for different Node types
mission.description:
This PR factors out many instances of `id: String` and `module: Vec<String>` into a new type, `NodeId`.

```rust
/// Identifies a node in the AST.
#[derive(Clone, Debug, PartialEq, Seriali

resolution.summary:
This looks great so far :D `NodeId` and `fqn` are good names, no objection there. I left a few comments in the code where I noticed things but there is really nothing major.

On `smartstring` and `arrayvec` worth a benchmark, but unless it's as measurable difference I think it'd be better to stick with build in types (less dependencies, less risks and less compile time :joy:)
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
